<Heading
  as={"h1"}

  children={"Get Card"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/v1/cards/{entity_uri}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>

</MethodEndpoint>



Fetch the synthesized memory card for an entity (Spec-X11-Recall-Graph).

Returns 404 when the entity has no live facts.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
